---
title: "Lab17: Analyzing sequencing data in the cloud"
author: "Alfred Phyo (PID: A18129346)"
format: html
---

## Downstream analysis

After getting the quantification data using a remote computer, the data were successfully transferred into this computer in the class17 folder. The following code performs downstream analysis on these data.

```{r}
library(tximport)

# setup the folder and filenames to read
folders <- dir(pattern="SRR21568*")
samples <- sub("_quant", "", folders)
files <- file.path( folders, "abundance.h5" )
names(files) <- samples

txi.kallisto <- tximport(files, type = "kallisto", txOut = TRUE)
```
